semantic: instantiates FileSessionStorage and passes it to gotd client for session persistence
data_flow: session file path → FileSessionStorage → gotd telegram.Options

semantic: accepts AuthFlow interface (implemented by TerminalAuth) and delegates authentication to it via auth.NewFlow
data_flow: AuthFlow callbacks → auth code, phone, password

semantic: wraps telegram.NewClient; delegates Run, Auth().Status(), Auth().IfNecessary() to gotd
exposes *tg.Client via API() for callers to issue Telegram API calls
creates session directory with os.MkdirAll before any network activity
